title: Noem fends off attacks from left and right in heated hearing: 5 takeaways
author: Rebecca Beitsch
fullText: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem faced aggressive lines of questioning from members of both sides of the aisle in a long-awaited hearing that fell amid growing scrutiny of the secretary’s handling of the department. Noem received a chilly reception at the Senate Judiciary Committee, even from some of the committee’s GOP members, with Sen. Thom…
